problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Metal-organic. Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
